Featured Work

A selection of enterprise learning projects spanning federal agencies, financial services, housing authorities, and Fortune 500 companies.

Learning in Fast Changing Environments

Workshop DesignAdult LearningFacilitation

Workshop curriculum for high-stakes operational teams. Designed to help trainers adapt content when processes evolve rapidly. Focuses on adult learning principles and performance support over knowledge transfer.

Custom Instructional DesignFacilitationBrand Compliance

Digital AdoptionJob AidsPerformance Support

Learning Ecosystem Strategy

LMS IntegrationNeeds AnalysisStakeholder Alignment

Assessment DesigneLearningEvaluation

Storyline 360 Simulation

My Design Process

A human-centered approach grounded in ADDIE methodology, adult learning theory, and AI-accelerated development.

1

Analyze

Stakeholder interviews, performance data review, and SME consultation to identify root causes and learning gaps.

2

Design

Learning objectives aligned to business goals. Assessment strategy and delivery method selection based on audience constraints.

3

Develop

Interactive prototypes and full courses in Articulate 360, with AI-assisted content generation and Section 508 compliance review.

4

Implement

LMS deployment and digital adoption platform integration. Stakeholder communication strategy and adoption support.

5

Evaluate

Kirkpatrick-aligned evaluation. Completion rates, performance metrics, and learner feedback driving continuous improvement.

About Me

I am an Experienced Learning Architect with 12+ years designing enterprise learning ecosystems for organizations where training directly impacts operational outcomes. My work focuses on translating complex performance challenges into scalable, measurable learning solutions that people can apply immediately on the job.

I have designed and architected learning programs for federal agencies, regulated utilities, financial institutions, and Fortune 500 companies, with an emphasis on scenario-based learning, digital adoption, and AI-accelerated design. I hold a Generative AI Automation specialization from Vanderbilt University and integrate AI tooling across every phase of the design lifecycle.

I am the creator of the rAIse the Bar AI Workforce Readiness Assessment, a diagnostic platform that identifies organizational AI readiness and positions learning leaders to close the gap between AI tool adoption and human capability development.

Kausation Consulting Services LLC

CEO & Chief Learning Officer | 2025 - Present

  • Lead AI-enabled learning architecture initiatives for enterprise and federal clients
  • Design scalable eLearning ecosystems and AI workforce readiness programs
  • Develop scenario-based training and performance consulting engagements
